# RavenMiner HQ — Python Dependencies
# Generated by Selene for RavenMiner HQ v3.9.8
#
# Install with:  pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# Note: tkinter is included with standard CPython.
#       On Debian/Ubuntu you may need: sudo apt install python3-tk

# ── Required ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
requests>=2.28.0          # HTTP API polling (miner + BTC price)

# ── Strongly Recommended ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Pillow>=9.0.0             # Vegvisir, raven & valknut image rendering
                          # Without Pillow the graphical watermarks will not display.

# ── Optional ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pystray>=0.19.0           # System-tray icon (minimise to tray)
                          # Requires Pillow. Remove this line if tray support is not needed.
